top_reason: The email contains multiple URLs (3) including one with HTTP, which is often used in phishing attempts to redirect users to malicious sites.
second_reason: The high number of uppercase letters (25) and special characters (20) in a relatively short subject and body length can indicate an attempt to grab attention, a common phishing tactic.
recommended_actions: Block the sender domain, do not click on any links, report the email to the security team, and educate users about recognizing phishing emails.
